title: dianthus bukovinensis
intro: Dianthus bukovinensis, also known as Bukovinian pink, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Dianthus bukovinensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Dianthus bukovinensis can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which are often consumed as teas or applied topically to skin conditions.
